entry.title: NURME Mint Rosemary Shampoo for Men 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Shampoo
Price: 10.50

Natural shampoo for men contains essential oils of mint and rosemary, which have a refreshing and revitalizing effect on hair. The shampoo leaves a pleasant fragrance and invigorates hair roots.

Rosemary essential oil helps to soothe dry scalp problems, while peppermint revitalizes and refreshes. This natural shampoo for men has been rated by users as one of the best hair cleansers to fight dandruff. Stress, the changing seasons and a weakened immune system are just a few of the factors that can cover the scalp with white patches of dandruff. Rosemary soothes itchy scalps and contains anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial components, so in milder cases, the right choice of shampoo may be all you need to get rid of dandruff.

How to use: Massage a small amount of shampoo into the hair in a circular motion. Leave on for 1-2 minutes and rinse. Repeat the process if necessary and use a conditioner.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene*

*Occurs naturally in essential oil

0% Parabens | 0% Silicones | 0% Synthetic and fragrances

entry.title: NURME Balneological Peat Scalp Soothing Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Shampoo
Price: 13.90

Nurme Peat Shampoo contains peat from Estonian bogs, Estonian own natural high technology. This shampoo is specially formulated for your scalp and hair. The unique combination of peat, menthol and tea tree oil provides deep cleansing and soothes the scalp. ProVitamin B5 and Wheat Protein moisturise, help to strengthen the hair and prevent split ends.

Key ingredients:

  • Balneological peat: Mineral- and antioxidant-rich peat helps soothe irritated scalps, balance the microbiome and promote hair growth. This deep-cleansing ingredient removes toxins and helps restore the scalp’s natural balance, giving hair a healthy shine and vitality.
  • Menthol: stimulates scalp circulation, promoting healthy hair growth and soothing scalp irritation. The optimal amount of menthol has been used in Peat Shampoo to provide mild cooling without irritation. The ideal choice for those who want to feel refreshed throughout the day.
  • Australian tea tree essential oil: balances the oiliness of the scalp, soothes and deeply cleanses, making it an ideal choice for both oily and dry scalps. Compared to tea tree oil from China, it has a slightly softer scent and is less allergenic.
How to use: Massage the shampoo into damp hair, leave on for a few minutes and rinse thoroughly. Repeat as necessary. For best results, use in combination with our Peat Conditioner.

Ingredients: Aqua*, Coco-Glucoside**, Sodium Coco-Sulfate**, Betaine**, Peat*, Sodium Chloride**, Panthenol**, Citric Acid**, Sodium Benzoate**, Glyceryl Oleate**, Potassium Sorbate**, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein**, Menthol**, Allantoin**, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Phytic Acid

* Natural origin
** Natural cosmetics approved ingredient

entry.title: HOIA Natural Peppermint and Bergamot Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

Fresh Peppermint scented organic Shampoo contains deep moisturizing aloe vera and a power-filled blend of essential oils. Shampoo contains a refreshing and cooling mint essential oil that stimulates hair growth; bergamot essential oil, which softens the hair; and tea tree oil, which has antibacterial properties.

Shampoo is natural and it does not contain sulfates and therefore will not dry your scalp. Shampoo is free from parabens, mineral oils, silicones, sulfates, synthetic preservatives and fragrances.

How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to wet hair and scalp, wash, and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Lauryl Glucoside, *Glycerin, Betain, Olive Oil Glycereth- 8 Esters, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Chloride, *Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Sodium Levulinate, *Mentha Piperita Oil, *Melaleuca Alternifolia Leaf Oil, *Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil, *Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, *Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Gluconate, Sodium Anisate, Lactic Acid, **Limonene, **Linalool.

*Organic

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: HOIA Natural Lavender and Rosemary Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

Fresh-smelling Organic Shampoo with Lavender & Rosemary contains aloe vera, which has a deep moisturizing effect and a mixture of essential oil. This Shampoo helps to stimulate hair growth, balance the work of the sebaceous glands, improve the blood supply to the scalp and keep it healthy.

Shampoo is natural and it does not contain sulfates and therefore will not dry your scalp. Shampoo is free from parabens, mineral oils, silicones, sulfates, synthetic preservatives and fragrances.

How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to wet hair and scalp, wash, and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Lauryl Glucoside, *Glycerin, Betain, Olive Oil Glycereth- 8 Esters , Xanthan Gum, Sodium Chloride, *Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Sodium Levulinate, *Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Oil, *Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil, *Mentha Piperita Leaf Oil, *Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, *Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Gluconate, Sodium Anisate, Lactic Acid, **Limonene, **Linalool.

*Organic

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: HOIA Natural Lemongrass Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

Organic shampoo with a fresh lemongrass smell contains deep moisturizing aloe vera and lemongrass essential oil, which has anti-dandruff properties, is perfect for hair that quickly becomes oily, strengthens the structure of the hair and has antibacterial properties. It is said that lemongrass essential oil also helps to fight lice.

Shampoo is natural and it does not contain sulfates and therefore will not dry your scalp. Shampoo is free from parabens, mineral oils, silicones, sulfates, synthetic preservatives and fragrances.

How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to wet hair and scalp, wash, and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Lauryl Glucoside, *Glycerin, Betain, Olive Oil Glycereth- 8 Esters, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Chloride, *Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Sodium Levulinate, *Cymbopogon Flexuosus Oil, *Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, *Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Gluconate, Sodium Anisate, Lactic Acid, **Citral, **Geraniol, **Limonene, **Linalool. 

*Organic

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: HOIA Natural Odorless Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

Discover our new gentle natural shampoo, formulated with deeply moisturizing aloe vera, wheat protein (plant-based keratin), locally sourced nettle extract, and argan oil. Designed to nourish, strengthen, and protect hair, this shampoo helps to reduce hair breakage and prevent hair loss while providing essential hydration.

Free from essential oils and fragrances, it is completely scent-free, making it ideal for all hair types, including sensitive scalps.

Formulated without petroleum products, parabens, silicones, sulfates, microplastics, synthetic preservatives, or artificial fragrances, this shampoo provides pure, natural hair care.

How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to wet hair and scalp, wash, and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium C14-16 Olen Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Lauryl Glucoside, *Glycerin, Betain, Olive Oil Glycereth- 8 Esters, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Chloride, *Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, *Citrus Nobilis Peel Oil, Sodium Levulinate ,*Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, *Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Gluconate, Lactic Acid, **Citral, **Linalool, **Limonene.

*Organic

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: HOIA Natural Mandarin Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

HOIA’s Natural Shampoo Mandarin is a gentle shampoo made with deeply hydrating aloe vera, wheat protein, locally sourced nettle extract, and argan oil. The addition of organic mandarin essential oil gives the shampoo a delightful holiday aroma while potentially improving scalp circulation and protecting hair from environmental damage.

This shampoo nourishes and strengthens hair while helping to prevent hair loss.

HOIA Natural Shampoo contains no petroleum byproducts, parabens, silicones, sulfates, microplastics, synthetic preservatives, or fragrances. Its ingredients are 99% natural, with 84% of them being organically sourced. It doesn’t dry out your scalp and is gentle on your hair.

How to use: Apply an appropriate amount to wet hair and scalp, wash, and rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium C14-16 Olen Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Lauryl Glucoside, *Glycerin, Betain, Olive Oil Glycereth- 8 Esters, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Chloride, *Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, *Citrus Nobilis Peel Oil, Sodium Levulinate ,*Urtica Dioica Leaf Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, *Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Gluconate, Lactic Acid, **Citral, **Linalool, **Limonene.

*Organic

**Natural components of essential oils

entry.title: BEE IT Shampoo & Body Wash for Kids Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 5.90

Physiological pH shampoo and body wash rich in natural ingredients to to enjoy the bath time as a pleasant experience of play and creativity. With organic aloe vera, sweet almond oil, organic honey and propolis, for a delicate and nourishing action.

Amused and clean, leaves hair velvety and luminous and skin soft.

How to use: Apply to hair and body and massage gently, then rinse.

Ingredients: Aqua, Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Coco-glucoside, Glyceryl oleate, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Glycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Parfum, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Myristyl lactate, Prunus amygdalus dulcis oil, Helianthus annuus seed oil, Citric acid, Calendula officinalis extract, Dehydroacetic acid, Mel*, Propolis, Tocopherol.

*Organic

Natural product with physiological pH 4.5-5.5

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Nourishing Shampoo 1000ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 40.00

Nourishing shampoo for damaged hair and scalp. It cleanses with care, maintaining the original structure of the hair with an energetic action. The soft creamy texture creates a light lather with extra ordinary effectiveness for soft and vital hair.

How to use: Apply to wet scalp and hair, massaging gently. Rinse gently, inhaling and exhaling slowly.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Xanthan gum, Glycerin, Disodium cocoamphodiacetate, Parfum [Fragrance], Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Citric acid, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Panthenol, Argania spinosa kernel oil, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Mel/Honey*, Coumarin, Limonene, Dehydroacetic acid, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, CI 19140 [Yellow 5].

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Shampoo With Rhubarb Extract Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Shampoo
Price: 25.50

Your hair is ready for invigoration. Indulge it with spring-like freshness, gloss, and shine!

The juicy rhubarb-enriched shampoo is designed for intensive enlivening of dry and damaged hair. The extra moisturising aloe extract with Pro-Vitamin B5 restores, nurtures, and reinforces the damaged hair structure. The vitamin treatment that your hair needs.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • The organic aloe extract has a deeply calming and moisturising effect on the skin. Aloe is well-known for its rich vitamin A, C, and E, folic acid, and collagen content.
  • Pro-Vitamin B5 adds healthy elasticity and shine to the hair and improves the structure of processed hair.

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Disodium Lauryl Sulfosuccinate, Sodium Chloride, Argan Oil Glycereth-8 Esters, Citric Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract*, Palmitamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Propylene Glycol, Isostearamide MIPA, Parfum, Panthenol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Glyceryl Laurate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 97,57%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulfate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Hair Stimulating Shampoo With Linden Flower Extract Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Shampoo
Price: 22.50

Take the summer with you – the linden flower shampoo with birch extract is a powerful Nordic elixir which supports and accelerates natural hair growth. The sweet scent of the shampoo will take you back to warm summer memories in a blink, bringing a smile to your face even on a bitterly cold winter morning.

The invigorating shampoo will make your hair less frizzy, nurturing and moisturising the structure of the hair and giving it a beautiful gloss and shine. The organic plant extracts support hair growth and improve the elasticity of the hair. The hair is soft, light, flowing after washing!

The shampoo is suitable for daily use for the entire family, including for sensitive and delicate scalps.

  • Organic Nordic birch extract stimulates circulation in the scalp and strengthens the roots, accelerating natural hair growth.
  • The organic aloe extract has a deeply calming and moisturising effect on the skin. Aloe is well-known for its rich vitamin A, C, and E, folic acid, and collagen content.
  • Pro-Vitamin B5 adds healthy elasticity and shine to the hair and improves the structure of processed hair.
  • Nordic linden flower extract has a moisturising and softening effect suitable for a sensitive or irritated scalp.

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Disodium Lauryl Sulfosuccinate, Sodium Chloride, Citric Acid, Argan Oil Glycereth-8 Esters*, Parfum, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Palmitamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Propylene Glycol, Isostearamide MIPA, Betula Alba (Birch) Leaf Extract, Glycerin, Alcohol, Panthenol, Tilia Cordata (Linden) Flower Extract, Glyceryl Laurate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 97,44%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: LUUV Natural Volumizing Seabuckthorn Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.50

Natural shampoo enriched with sea buckthorn oil is natural and gentle, which gives hair fluffiness and shine. Sea buckthorn oil strengthens the hair, provides the necessary nutrients to the hair and scalp, and helps prevent split ends. Wheat protein strengthens hair, stimulates hair growth and increases hair fluffiness and elasticity. Essential oils contribute to the normal functioning of the sebum secretion of the scalp and give a feeling of freshness.

  • suitable for all hair types, including oily hair
  • provides natural volume
  • with cleansing effect
  • gives hair fluffiness and shine
  • moisturizes and strengthens the hair
  • with a citrus scent
  • seabuckthorn oil to nourish the hair
  • made with natural cleansers
  • gentle on the scalp
  • 98,58% natural ingredients

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Vegetable Oil, Panthenol, Cetyl Alcohol, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Ricinus Communis Seed (Castor) Oil, Glycerin, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Glyceryl Stearate, Citric Acid, Tocopherol (E-vitamin), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Natural Softening Honey Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.50

Natural honey shampoo makes the hair soft and easy to comb, nourishing the hair from roots to ends. Organic honey extract makes the hair silky and protects from environmental effects. Organic barley extract stimulates hair growth and gives shine. Wheat protein strengthens the hair and increases elasticity. Also suitable for colored hair.

  • suitable for all hair types, including dyed hair
  • strengthens hair from root to tip
  • with a softening and protective effect
  • gives hair softness
  • improves hair structure 
  • with a honey-sweet smell
  • gentle on the scalp
  • made with mild, plant-based cleansers
  • with natural bee glue extract
  • 99,22% natural ingredients

natural | cruelty free | sustainable

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Betaine, Citric Acid, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Propolis (Bee glue) extract, Panthenol, Hordeum Vulgare (Barlay) Extract, Glyceryl Oleate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Parfum

entry.title: LUUV Natural Caring Shampoo with Plum Oil 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.50

LUUV natural shampoo with plum oil is suitable for everyday use for all hair types. Cold-pressed plum kernel oil moisturizes both the scalp and hair and protects hair from heat treatment. Natural betaine and aloe keep hair moisturized. Natural gentle plum shampoo makes hair well combed, silky and elastic. Suitable for both coloured and natural hair.

  • suitable for all hair types, including dyed hair and curly hair
  • with caring and softening effect
  • moisturizes and protects your hair
  • protects hair from heat treatment
  • mild, plant-based cleansers
  • gentle on the scalp
  • gentle enough for everyday use
  • with organic plum oil for a silky finish
  • 99,18% natural ingredients

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Lauryl Glucose Carboxylate (and) Lauryl Glucoside, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Cocamidoprpyl Betaine, Glycerin, Betaine, Prunus Domestica (Plum) Seed oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Sodium Benzoate (and) Potassium Sorbate, Coco-Glucoside (and) Glyceryl Oleate, Cymbopogon Martini (Palmarosa) oil, Citric Acid, Parfum

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.50

LUUV natural kids shampoo  – where fun meets healthy hair! This shampoo takes your child’s hair care to new heights with its completely natural, tear-free formula. Designed for little adventurers, it leaves hair strong, shiny, and gently detangles even the most resistant knots. With ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate, you can trust that LUUV kids shampoo is not only gentle on your little one’s hair but also on the environment.

Carefully selected herbal detergents are perfect for your child’s delicate scalp, ensuring a nurturing and soothing wash. Shampoo is also infused with the goodness of moisturizing aloe and plant betaine – not only does it make their hair easy to comb, but it also strengthens it from root to tip, leaving it looking healthy, vibrant, and ready for any adventure that comes their way. The sweet and juicy pear aroma is naturally derived and allergen-free. LUUV natural kids shampoo is not only natural but also vegan, making it a choice you can feel great about. Experience hair that’s as soft as a mother’s caress and join the fun today!

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Tear-free formula
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 98,4%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Lauryl Glucose Carboxylate, Lauryl Glucoside, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Betaine, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Aroma

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Hair & Body Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Shampoo
Price: 8.90

Petit&Jolie Hair&Body Shampoo cleanses and cares for the skin and hair in a mild way. The special composition ensures supple skin and prevents dehydration. The shampoo is suitable for children with dry and sensitive skin. It doesn't sting the eyes.

Like all our products, the baby hair & body shampoo does not contain parabens, SLS, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes. The baby shampoo is made from 100% natural ingredients.

The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic.

How to use: While taking a shower or bath, add a small amount of shampoo to your hand or washcloth and lightly massage the skin and hair of your baby. Rinse well with water afterwards.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Coco-Glucoside, Decyl Glucoside, Xanthan Gum, Glyceryl Oleate, Parfum*, Dicaprylyl Ether, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Levulinate

* natural essential oils

entry.title: Clarification Moisturizing Powder Shampoo 40g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Clarification
Type: Shampoo
Price: 18.90

This brand believes in a future where beauty coexists harmoniously with sustainability.

100% purity treatments, 0% added water!

Moisturizing Powder Shampoo with organic rice and corn powder is an innovative washing powder for hair. It foams instantly and generously on contact with water like a classic shampoo. It is composed exclusively of gentle and natural origin ingredients and suits also sensitive scalps.

Powder Shampoo 100% natural origin ingredients provide hydration, volume and shine to the hair.

The plastic-free packaging made from recycled aluminum is compact and light, easy to transport. And of course no sulfates, no preservatives.

How to use: Pour the equivalent of a teaspoon of powder into your hand, apply to already wet hair. Repeat if necessary for longer hair. Do not inhale or breathe the dust, avoid contact with eyes.

Ingredients: Sodium Myristoyl Glutamate, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Citric acid, Sodium chloride, Oryza Sativa St arch / Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch*, Zea Mays starch / Zea Mays (Corn) Starch*, Maltodextrin, aqua/water, Kaolin, Sodium cocoate, Glucose, Parfum / Fragrance, Sodium Cocoyl Alaninate, Sodium Hyaluronate.

100% of natural origin ingredients  

11,12% of the total ingredients come from organic farming

*Ingredients from organic farming

entry.title: Clarification The Volume Powder Dry Shampoo 35g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Clarification
Type: Shampoo
Price: 19.90

This brand believes in a future where beauty coexists harmoniously with sustainability.

100% purity treatments, 0% added water!

The Volume Powder is ideal for sensitive scalps looking for a fresh feeling and texture between two shampoos. 100% ingredients of natural origin with corn starch, white clay and oat flour.

How to use: Sprinkle a small amount of powder in the palm of the hand, then apply the  powder on the roots. Gently massage the scalp to distribute the powder evenly and help absorb the sebum. Brush the hair until the powder totally disappears.

Do not inhale or breathe the dust, avoid contact with eyes. Wash hands after use.

Ingredients: Zea Mays (corn) starch, Kaolin, Avena Sativa (Oat) kernel flour 

100% of natural origin ingredients  

95% of the total ingredients come from organic farming

entry.title: Clarification Duo Set of Cleansing Powders - Body and Hair
entry.summary:
Vendor: Clarification
Type: Shampoo
Price: 34.90

This brand believes in a future where beauty coexists harmoniously with sustainability.

100% purity treatments, 0% added water!

The set includes The Moisturizing Powder Shampoo (40g) and The Body Wash Powder (40g), both offer a unique care experience.

Moisturizing Powder Shampoo with organic rice and corn powder is an innovative washing powder for hair. It foams instantly and generously on contact with water like a classic shampoo. It is composed exclusively of gentle and natural origin ingredients and suits also sensitive scalps.

Powder Shampoo 100% natural origin ingredients provide hydration, volume and shine to the hair.

The Body Wash Powder with organic oats and white clay is very innovative. It foams instantly and generously on contact with water like a traditional shower gel. It is composed exclusively of gentle and natural origin ingredients and suits sensitive skin.

It is the natural cleansing treatment for the body that gently moisturizes and cleanses all skin types. 

How to use:

Moisturizing Powder Shampoo: Pour the equivalent of a teaspoon of powder into your hand, apply to already wet hair. Repeat if necessary for longer hair. Do not inhale or breathe the dust, avoid contact with eyes.

The Body Wash Powder: Pour the equivalent of a teaspoon of powder into your hand, add some drops of water and rub hands together until it foams, then apply on wet skin. Repeat if necessary.

Do not inhale or breathe the dust, avoid contact with eyes. 

Ingredients:

Moisturizing Powder Shampoo: Sodium Myristoyl Glutamate, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Citric acid, Sodium chloride, Oryza Sativa St arch / Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch*, Zea Mays starch / Zea Mays (Corn) Starch*, Maltodextrin, aqua/water, Kaolin, Sodium cocoate, Glucose, Parfum / Fragrance, Sodium Cocoyl Alaninate, Sodium Hyaluronate.

100% of natural origin ingredients  

11,12% of the total ingredients come from organic farming

*Ingredients from organic farming

The Body Wash Powder: 

Sodium Lauroyl Glutamate, Aqua / Water, Kaolin, Avena Sativa Kernel Flour / Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Flour*, Sodium Myristoyl Glutamate, Citric Acid, Parfum / Fragrance, Glucose, Sodium Hyaluronate

100% of natural origin ingredients  

10% of the total ingredients come from organic farming

*Ingredients from organic farming
